title: Amber Home 43cm Shiny Copper Metal Coat Hanger 20pcs, Space Saving Rose Gold Metal Clothes Hangers with Notches, Heavy Duty Strong Metal Wire Hanger for Blouse Dress Shirt Jacket Pants
features: 【Elegant Design】Set of 20pcs. Extremely rich looking hangers decorate your precious garments in wardrobe. Suitable adult size with length 43cm, diameter of wire 4.0mm, strong enough to hold your heavier garments and preserve the shape of your clothes. The bottom of hanger is perfect for hanging jeans, trousers and slacks. One hanger can organize your pant and shirt coat.

【Heavy Duty & Durable】Made of durable 4.0mm diameter metal wire and plated with a beautiful copper color, extra strong than other metal hanger with 3.0 or 3.2mm to hold heavier clothes, such as jeans, suits, winter coats, woolen coats and down jackets. Heavy duty structure can be used for a long time and not easy to deform.
【Bilateral Notches】Convenient V-shape notches along the hanger shoulder allow you to effortlessly hang thin strappy camisoles, nightgowns and slip dress, preventing clothing from falling.

【Space Saving】Ideal for closet or portable wardrobe, the hangers feature an ultra-slim space-saving design, will be able to maximize storage space and fit in more clothes, save your messy clothes and wardrobe.
【Quality Satisfaction Guarantee】If there is any quality problem for Amber Home hangers within 90 days, please contact us by clicking "ask seller".
description: Product Description Amber Home 43cm Shiny Copper Metal Shirt Hanger 20pcs, Space Saving Rose Gold Metal Clothes Hangers with Notches, Heavy Duty Strong Metal Wire Hanger for Blouse Dress Coat Jacket Pants Amber Home is an industry and trade integration company with more than 14 years’ history specialized in designing and producing clothes hangers. We are located in south of China, famous for large amount of natural resources and other geographical advantages. We are really proud of our high grade products, especially wooden and metal hangers. With the combination of superior materials and exquisite craftsmanship, our hangers feature high-end, magnificent and classy, suitable for home use and fashionable clothing stores. Using our hangers not only a way to maximize your restricted storage space but also can make your closet more coordinating. Besides, innovative designs and good services are also what we focus on. So far we have provided hangers for many famous fashion brands all over the world. High grade metal material makes the hanger high sturdy and long durable. Smooth surface by glossy plating protects your hand and clothes from abrasing. Slim space-saving body, sturdy construction, suitable for all kinds of shirts, blouses, dresses, coats, suits etc. · Material: Metal · Color: Copper · Dimension: Length 43cm * Height 21cm * Dia. 4mm · Weight: 100g/pc, the hanger is firm enough to hang clothes within 5kg. · Packaging: 20pcs/set Strong Construction With a wire diametre of 4mm and anti-rust feature, the hanger is rather durable for lasting use. Precise Notches Thoughtful notches design, perfect for hanging clothes with shoulder straps such as underwear or slip dress preventing them from slipping. Fashionable Design The elegant copper color design will surely improve your hanging experience, upgrading your closet immediately, making your closet much neater and more elegant.
